response.justification: Bogdan has a broad and legitimate engineering background spanning over 15 years with clear strengths in high-throughput distributed systems, polyglot development, and software craftsmanship. However, the role demands deep, specific expertise in experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, and growth engineering — none of which appear in the resume. His current and past roles are product/full-stack engineering positions with no meaningful exposure to A/B testing frameworks, experiment assignment pipelines, rollout risk management, or growth measurement systems. The seniority gap is also notable: the role targets a Principal/IC6 individual contributor with demonstrated cross-org technical leadership in this specific domain, while the candidate operates at a Senior/Staff product engineering level.
strengths: Hands-on high-throughput distributed systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second, demonstrating production-scale reliability thinking
Polyglot engineer proficient in multiple required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript/TypeScript) with 15+ years of continuous delivery across diverse domains
Strong software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and evidence of mentoring and community contribution via workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Zero documented experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or rollout automation — the core technical domain of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure ownership, metrics pipeline design, or statistical/experimental analysis work; data aptitude requirements are unmet
Career trajectory and current title (Senior/Staff product engineer) fall short of the Principal/IC6 bar, with no demonstrated cross-org technical leadership or growth-domain ownership at scale

key_factors.factor: Seniority and domain gap vs. Principal/IC6 bar
